title: Knowledge Patterns
description: Schema for the active knowledge base patterns file (.forge/knowledge/patterns.json). Patterns are codebase regularities discovered by the implementer during execution.

domain.description: Domain area (e.g., persistence, naming, architecture, testing, configuration)

description.description: Human-readable description of the discovered pattern

pattern.description: Regex or glob pattern describing the structural regularity

evidence_file_count.description: Number of files that conform to this pattern

confidence.description: Pattern reliability. Starts at MEDIUM for auto-discovered, promoted after successful applications.

application_count.description: Times this pattern was applied as context for an agent. Minimum 3 for meaningful scoring.

false_positive_count.description: Times this pattern was loaded but did not match the current context

last_applied.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful application

source.description: pattern-discovery = from implementer observation; auto-discovered = from memory discovery; manual = user-authored
